message:
Fix clippy warnings: cfg-gated import, safe u16 cast, lint allows

- Gate ALL_SCREEN_IDS import with #[cfg(test)] since it is only used in
  test code, silencing unused-import warning in release builds
- Replace truncating `as u16` cast in scale_permille with
  u16::try_from().unwrap_or(u16::MAX) for saturating overflow safety
- Add clippy lint allows for cast_precision_loss, cast_possible_truncation,
  cast_sign_loss on shimmer animation helpers, and too_many_lines on
  MessageEntry::render_row

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
